en: A Health, Safety and Environmental (HSE) Committee or Safety Committee is a representative group of employees and managers. HSE committees provide governance and support of HSE risk identification and mitigation.
Does your company have a Health, Safety, and Environmental (HSE) committee?
Some examples are Safety Meetings/Toolbox Talks, Training, Job Hazard Analysis/Safe Work Method Statement.
Does your company communicate Health, Safety & Environmental (HSE) information to your workers to provide the knowledge required to perform their job safely?
Please identify the type of stop work orders and/or fines:
Are there any HSE (Health, Safety, Environmental) related judgments, claims or suits pending or outstanding against your company?
Are employees informed of job / task specific hazards?
Has your company been involved in any reportable spills or releases in the past three years?
Does your company have a Health, Safety and Environmental (HSE) inspection program in place?
Does your company provide reasonable assurance workers are physically able to perform their assigned duties?
If yes, what is the process that is followed to assure employees are physically fit?
Does your company have a process to communicate safe working practices to a multilingual workforce?
